raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> my Macy 's XXXX XXXX was used at Macy 's XXXX to make purchases I did not authorize in the amount of XXXX. The card number ended in XXXX. I reported the transactions as fraudulent because I did not authorize or make the charge. 

XXXX contacting Macy 's XXXX card I was told the transactions were processed XXXX ( card not present ) which is indicative of fraud. Citibank reversed my fraud claim not in my favor. I only realized the reversal recently because of recent collection calls from the bank relative to payment. 

I have reopened the dispute but am very concerned about the conflicting information the bank is telling me. First it was XXXX, then they claimed someone used my security word to make the fraudulent charges. 

I did not make the charges nor did I authorize anyone to make the charges. These are fraud. I have requested arbitration if fraud is not rectified. I have also filed a case with credit bureaus about the fraudulent charges
